narrative:
Precinct Concord South East (precinct in Miami County) has 1,207 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
